category.scope_note: Wireless and IoT devices incorporating radio transmitters, including Wi-Fi, Bluetooth, Zigbee, and cellular modules, exported from China to the Swiss market.

title.en: China-to-Switzerland Wireless / IoT Device Compliance Gap Matrix
title.zh: 中国无线/物联网设备进入瑞士：合规差距矩阵
title.zht: 中國無線/物聯網裝置進入瑞士：合規差距矩陣

description.en: Public-interest, source-linked comparison of common China wireless and IoT device documentation against Switzerland OFCOM requirements under the Radio and Telecommunications Terminal Equipment Ordinance (RVAV, SR 784.101.2), covering radio type approval, EMC (Fernmeldegesetz / EMV-Verordnung), electrical safety, importer and authorised representative obligations, and cybersecurity. Switzerland is not an EU/EEA member but maintains bilateral MRA agreements that allow CE-backed test reports to support Swiss conformity assessment.
description.zh: 公益性、带来源链接的中国无线及物联网设备文件与瑞士OFCOM要求的差距对照，依据《无线电和电信终端设备条例》（RVAV，SR 784.101.2），涵盖无线电型号批准、电磁兼容（《电信法》/电磁兼容条例）、电气安全、进口商与授权代表义务及网络安全。瑞士非欧盟/欧洲经济区成员，但签有双边互认协议（MRA），允许CE支持的检测报告用于瑞士合格评定。
description.zht: 公益性、附來源連結的中國無線及物聯網裝置文件與瑞士OFCOM要求的差距對照，依據《無線電和電信終端設備條例》（RVAV，SR 784.101.2），涵蓋無線電型號批准、電磁相容（《電信法》/電磁相容條例）、電氣安全、進口商與授權代表義務及網路安全。瑞士非歐盟/歐洲經濟區成員，但簽有雙邊互認協議（MRA），允許CE支持的檢測報告用於瑞士合格評定。

disclaimer.en: This page is an informational comparison aid, not a certification decision, legal opinion, notified-body assessment, customs determination, or market-access approval. Exporters, importers, and distributors should verify current Swiss law, applicable OFCOM ordinances, bilateral MRA status, and national requirements with qualified professionals before shipment or market placement.
disclaimer.zh: 本页仅为信息性对照工具，不构成认证结论、法律意见、公告机构评审、海关裁定或市场准入批准。出口商、进口商和经销商在出货或投放市场前，应与合格专业人士核验现行瑞士法律、OFCOM适用条例、双边互认协议状态及国家要求。
disclaimer.zht: 本頁僅為資訊性對照工具，不構成認證結論、法律意見、公告機構評審、海關裁定或市場准入批准。出口商、進口商和經銷商在出貨或投放市場前，應與合格專業人士核驗現行瑞士法律、OFCOM適用條例、雙邊互認協議狀態及國家要求。

answer_first.en: Switzerland mirrors EU RED via the RVAV (SR 784.101.2) and accepts CE-marked test reports under the CH-EU Mutual Recognition Agreement, but manufacturers must issue a separate Swiss Declaration of Conformity referencing Swiss law. OFCOM administers radio type approval; Chinese SRRC and CCC approvals are not recognised. A Swiss-specific Authorised Representative or a Swiss importer assuming responsibility is required — the EU Authorised Representative mandate does not automatically extend to Switzerland. Type J plug (230 V / 50 Hz) and SENS/SWICO WEEE registration are additional Swiss-specific obligations.
answer_first.zh: 瑞士通过RVAV（SR 784.101.2）镜像欧盟RED指令，并依据瑞欧互认协议（MRA）接受带有CE标志的检测报告，但制造商须另行签发引用瑞士法律的瑞士合格声明。OFCOM负责无线电型号批准；中国SRRC和CCC批准不被认可。需要指定瑞士授权代表或由承担责任的瑞士进口商——欧盟授权代表授权不自动延伸至瑞士。J型插头（230 V / 50 Hz）和SENS/SWICO废弃电子电气设备（WEEE）注册是额外的瑞士特定义务。
answer_first.zht: 瑞士透過RVAV（SR 784.101.2）鏡像歐盟RED指令，並依據瑞歐互認協議（MRA）接受帶有CE標誌的檢測報告，但製造商須另行簽發引用瑞士法律的瑞士合格聲明。OFCOM負責無線電型號批准；中國SRRC和CCC批准不被認可。需要指定瑞士授權代表或由承擔責任的瑞士進口商——歐盟授權代表授權不自動延伸至瑞士。J型插頭（230 V / 50 Hz）和SENS/SWICO廢棄電子電氣設備（WEEE）登記是額外的瑞士特定義務。

editorial_controls.change_policy: Rows must include publisher, official URL, access date, verification flag, and last_verified before human_reviewed can be true.
